briefdescription.para: Creates a AnimatedImageVisual object.

simplesect.para: The newly created image visual object.

briefdescription.para: Gets the resource url of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Only valid value returns if SetResourceUrl called. Return empty string if SetResourceUrl called.
The resource url of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the resource URL for a single image.

detaileddescription.para: This method cannot be used together with SetResourceUrlList; they are mutually exclusive. Use SetResourceUrl when you want to display a static image.

briefdescription.para: Gets the list of resource urls of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Only valid value returns if SetResourceUrlList called. Return empty list if SetResourceUrl called.
The list of resource urls of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets a list of resource URLs for an animated image sequence.

detaileddescription.para: This method cannot be used together with SetResourceUrl; they are mutually exclusive. Provide multiple URLs to create an animation.

parameterdescription.para: The list of resource URLs to set

briefdescription.para: Gets whether synchronous loading is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous loading is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image is loaded synchronously.

parameterdescription.para: True to load the image on the main thread synchronously

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired width of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The desired width of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired width of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired height of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The desired height of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired height of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the sampling mode of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The sampling mode of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the sampling mode of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the pixel area of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The pixel area of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the pixel area of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the wrap mode for u coordinate of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The wrap mode for u coordinate of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the wrap mode for u coordinate of the AnimatedImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The wrap mode for u coordinate to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the wrap mode for v coordinate of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The wrap mode for v coordinate of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the wrap mode for v coordinate of the AnimatedImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The wrap mode for v coordinate to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether broken image is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if broken image is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to enable broken image.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the load policy of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The load policy of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the load policy of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the release policy of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The release policy of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the release policy of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the fitting mode of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The fitting mode of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the fitting mode of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether orientation correction is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if orientation correction is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to correct the image orientation.

parameterdescription.para: True to correct the image orientation

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether synchronous sizing is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous sizing is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to use synchronous sizing.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether pre-multiplied alpha is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if pre-multiplied alpha is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image uses pre-multiplied alpha.

parameterdescription.para: True if the image has pre-multiplied alpha

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the alpha mask url of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The alpha mask url of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the alpha mask url of the AnimatedImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The alpha mask url to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the mask content scale of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The mask content scale of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the mask content scale of the AnimatedImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The mask content scale to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether crop to mask is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if crop to mask is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to crop to mask.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the masking type of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The masking type of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the masking type of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the loop count of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The loop count of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the loop count of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the play range of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The play range of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the play range of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the stop behavior of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The stop behavior of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the stop behavior of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the frame speed factor of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The frame speed factor of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the frame speed factor of the AnimatedImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The frame speed factor to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the batch size of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The batch size of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the batch size of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the cache size of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The cache size of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the cache size of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the frame delay of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The frame delay of the AnimatedImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the frame delay of the AnimatedImageVisual.

detaileddescription.para: This property is only relevant when using SetResourceUrlList (animated sequence). It specifies the delay between frames in milliseconds.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the play state of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The play state of the AnimatedImageVisual
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current frame number of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The current frame number of the AnimatedImageVisual
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Gets the total frame number of the AnimatedImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The total frame number of the AnimatedImageVisual. -1 if image decode is not completed yet.
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Play animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Pause animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Stop animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Jump to specific frame.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: This constructor is used by Dali New() methods.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: AnimatedImageVisual is a owner of Visual::Base with Visual::ANIMATED_IMAGE, to render sequence of images.

detaileddescription.para: It can use CornerRadius / CornerSquareness / Borderline feature
